title: Physical Canonical Persistence and Migration
objective: Implement the definitive hosted mapping for canonical structured state and temporal authority, including schema migration, indexes, transactions, reservations, receipts, conflicts, and reconstruction.
exit_criteria: The physical schema preserves historical truth, current authority, recorded time, effective time, and authority-valid time
Canonical writes remain reachable only through governed mutation paths
Transactions, reservations, receipts, conflicts, and temporal lineage are physically reconstructable
Schema migration preserves identifiers, hashes, authority, and historical lineage
Cross-tenant physical isolation matches the selected production-control contract
Rollback restores the last validated schema and canonical fingerprint

evidence.description: Versioned physical canonical schema with tenant-scoped temporal rows, current-authority projection, transaction/reservation/receipt/conflict journals, and governed-write trigger.
Deterministic V2 temporal and transaction index migration.
Deterministic V2 rollback restoring the prior physical schema fingerprint.
Implemented governed physical canonical persistence, migration, reconstruction, cross-tenant isolation, and rollback proof.
CI passed after correcting the TEST authorization fixture window.
Runtime Coverage passed for the corrected Sprint 40 implementation.
Work Control Authority passed for the corrected Sprint 40 implementation.
